Class Product

java.lang.Object
Product
public class Product extends Object
Represents a Product entity in the application. Uses JavaFX properties to allow for data binding in TableViews and other UI controls.

  • Property Summary

    Type

    Description

    price
    The price of the product, observable for UI updates.
